/usr/bin/ar qc ../lib/libjsonfortran.a "CMakeFiles/jsonfortran.dir/__/external/json-fortran/src/json_kinds.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/jsonfortran.dir/__/external/json-fortran/src/json_parameters.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/jsonfortran.dir/__/external/json-fortran/src/json_string_utilities.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/jsonfortran.dir/__/external/json-fortran/src/json_value_module.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/jsonfortran.dir/__/external/json-fortran/src/json_file_module.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/jsonfortran.dir/__/external/json-fortran/src/json_module.F90.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib ../lib/libjsonfortran.a
